Index.description: Build state-of-the-art tooling while guaranteeing data never leaves European borders. A technical and jurisdictional challenge.
Index.sovereignty_desc: Build state-of-the-art tooling while guaranteeing data never leaves European borders. A technical and jurisdictional challenge.

About.title: About the
About.p1: Built in Europe was born out of a critical need: the intersection of cutting-edge analytics and strict European data sovereignty.
About.p2: In today's interconnected world, building powerful analytics solutions often comes at the cost of data leaving European borders. This introduces complex legal, jurisdictional, and ethical challenges for companies and institutions.
About.p3: Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to bring together the brightest minds in data, engineering, and design to build innovative analytics platforms that are technically and jurisdictionally constrained within the European Union.
About.principles_1: Sovereignty: Data stays in the EU. Period.
About.principles_2: Innovation: Do not compromise on power for privacy.
About.principles_3: Collaboration: Build open, transparent, and trustworthy systems together.
About.org1_bio: Thijs brings deep expertise in data engineering and EU-compliant analytics infrastructure. Function Data is at the forefront of building privacy-first data tooling for European businesses.
About.org2_bio: Wout drives the community and venue side of Built in Europe. Relevant Online is a digital agency based in Utrecht with a strong belief in open, transparent technology.
About.org3_bio: Suze handles partnerships, communications, and the live finals experience. She ensures the hackathon is welcoming, well-run, and impactful for every participant.
